o-desmethyltramadol.dose_note: NOTE: Insufflation is reported to be extremely painful.
o-desmethyltramadol.name: o-desmethyltramadol

properties.dose: Oral Light: 10-25mg Common: 25-50mg Strong: 50-100mg+ | NOTE: Insufflation is reported to be extremely painful.
properties.effects: Euphoria, Dry Mouth, Mood lift, Itchiness, Relaxant, Constipation, Pupil constriction, Analgesia.
properties.summary: An opioid analgesic which is the main active metabolite of tramadol. The drug is a µ full agonist and has additional affinity for δ (delta) and κ-opioid receptors.
